Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: jewelry worn on costume [300209292], jewelry by location [300211901], jewelry [300209286], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Devices, often ornamental, used to secure the cuffs of a shirt, which is generally supplied with buttonholes or other openings to allow insertion of the cuff link. Forms include an ornamental disc or other shape attached to a toggle, or two linked ornamental buttons.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Botón o utensilio en forma de botón de carácter ornamental, utilizado para abrochar los puños de la camisa.
Met elkaar verbonden sierknopen of knoopachtige artikelen om de manchetten van een overhemd te sluiten.
連接的裝飾性鈕扣或類似鈕扣的裝置，用以固定襯衫袖口。

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)
2000010911/Detroit Art Registration and Information System Glossary (1980)
2000030201/National Museum of American History, Dictionary of Costume (n.d.)
2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)

2000106168/Parks Canada Descriptive Dictionary of Objects / Dictionnaire descriptif d’objets (c 1996)

Term_Source.Page: Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.

Source.Source_ID: 2000106041/Centraal Museum Utrecht, MoMu Fashion Museum of Antwerp databases (2018-)
